title: IssueProducerRun
description: Append-only NDJSON record of an issue production run. Captures which facts generated which issues, which were rejected and why, making task production auditable. See docs/ai-native/issue-producer-run-ledger.md.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version pinned to 1. Consumers must reject records with a different version.

runId.description: Unique identifier for this production run (UUID).

recordedAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this run was recorded.

actor.description: Who or what initiated the issue production run (e.g. 'self-cycle', 'batch-launcher').

mode.description: Run mode. dry-run = preview only, execute = issues were created on GitHub.

factsConsumed.description: Facts that were read as input to generate issue proposals.

issuesProduced.description: Issues that were proposed or created, with full CONTROL APPENDIX fields.

issuesRejected.description: Issues that were rejected during the run, with rejection reasons.

outcome.description: Overall outcome of the production run.

blockReason.description: Top-level reason when outcome is blocked.

meta.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata for downstream analysis. Must not contain secrets, tokens, or credentials.

factRef.description: Reference to a fact consumed during the production run.

factId.description: Unique identifier for the consumed fact.

source.description: Where the fact was read from (e.g. 'main-health.json', 'task-board.json').

producedIssue.description: An issue proposed or created by the producer, with full CONTROL APPENDIX fields.

issueNumber.description: GitHub issue number if the issue was created. Null for dry-run or failed creation.

taskType.description: Task type from the worker contract.

conflictGroup.description: Logical conflict group for parallelism control.

actorRole.description: Worker role from the task contract rolePacket.

allowedFiles.description: File glob patterns the worker may edit.

forbiddenFiles.description: File glob patterns the worker must not edit.

status.description: Production status: proposed (dry-run), created (on GitHub), blocked (policy gate), failed (creation error).

humanRequired.description: Whether this issue requires human review before execution.

rejectedIssue.description: An issue rejected during the production run.

conflictGroup.description: Conflict group of the rejected issue.

reason.description: Why the issue was rejected (e.g. 'title overlap with existing', 'conflictGroup already exists').
